description: Style Note This fabulous pair of denims from denizen adds an edgy style to your look, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with a T-shirt and sneakers for a weekend coffee date or with a crisp white shirt and a structured blazer for a dressed up look. Product Description Dark blue jeans, has a buttoned and zippered closure, belt loops at the waist, brand patch at the back on the waist, two insert pockets in front with a coin pocket in the right insert pocket and two patch pockets at the back with embroidered brand logo on one. Our stylist has paired this with a blue belt in the picture. Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry normal Use hot iron Size and Fit Regular straight fit The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
